debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

proof:
let s := { n : ℕ+ | n.val ≡ 1 [MOD φ (2 ^ (n.val + 1) - 3)] }
  have hs : s.Infinite := by
    refine' Set.infinite_of_forall_gt 1 fun n hn => _
    use ⟨n + 1, Nat.succ_pos n⟩
    simp [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
    exact ⟨Nat.succ_pos n, dvd_refl _⟩
  refine' ⟨s, hs, fun m hm n hn hmn => _⟩
  have h : 2 ^ m.val ≡ 3 [MOD 2 ^ n.val - 3] := by
    rw [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd]
    exact Nat.dvd_sub_pow_of_dvd (Nat.sub_dvd_of_sub_eq (Nat.sub_self _))
  have h' : 2 ^ n.val ≡ 3 [MOD 2 ^ m.val - 3] := by
    rw [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd]
    exact Nat.dvd_sub_pow_of_dvd (Nat.sub_dvd_of_sub_eq (Nat.sub_self _))
  refine' Nat.coprime_of_dvd _ _ fun p hp hpm hpn => _
  have hp2 : p ≠ 2 := by
    intro h
    rw [h] at hpm hpn
    have := Nat.dvd_sub' hpm hpn
    simp at this
    exact hmn this
  have h1 := Nat.coprime_pow_of_prime hp2 (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
  have h2 := Nat.coprime_pow_of_prime hp2 (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
  exact Nat.coprime_mul h1 h2

debug_info.goal:
x a : Fin 4 → ℝ
h₀ : Function.Injective a
h₁ : ∀ (i : Fin 4), ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = 1
⊢ (x 0, x 1, x 2, x 3) = Imo1966P5.solution_fun (a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3)

proof:
let s := ![a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3]
  let ai := s.min' (by simp)
  let al := s.max' (by simp)
  have hmin : ∀ k, ai ≤ s k := fun k => s.min'_le _ (by simp)
  have hmax : ∀ k, s k ≤ al := fun k => s.le_max' _ (by simp)
  let i := s.findIdx (· = ai)
  let l := s.findIdx (· = al)
  have hi : s i = ai := List.findIdx_get (by simp)
  have hl : s l = al := List.findIdx_get (by simp)
  have neq : i ≠ l := by intro h; rw [h, hi, hl] at h₀; exact h₀ rfl
  have hx : ∀ k, x k = if k = i ∨ k = l then (1 / (al - ai)) else 0 := by
    intro k
    by_cases hk : k = i ∨ k = l
    · cases' hk with hk hk
      · have eq1 : ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = |a i - a i| * x i + |a i - a l| * x l + ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a i - a j| * x j := by
          simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, hk, neq.symm]
        have eq2 : |a i - a i| * x i + |a i - a l| * x l = (al - ai) * x l := by
          simp [hi, hl, abs_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg_of_le (hmax l))]
        have eq3 : ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a i - a j| * x j = 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro j hj
          simp [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_singleton] at hj
          simp [hj.1, hj.2]
        rw [eq1, eq2, eq3, h₁] at hk
        simp [hk, neq.symm, sub_ne_zero_of_ne (Ne.symm (h₀ (by rw [hi, hl]; exact hk)))]
      · have eq1 : ∑ j, |a l - a j| * x j = |a l - a i| * x i + |a l - a l| * x l + ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a l - a j| * x j := by
          simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, hk, neq]
        have eq2 : |a l - a i| * x i + |a l - a l| * x l = (al - ai) * x i := by
          simp [hi, hl, abs_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg_of_le (hmax l))]
        have eq3 : ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a l - a j| * x j = 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro j hj
          simp [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_singleton] at hj
          simp [hj.1, hj.2]
        rw [eq1, eq2, eq3, h₁] at hk
        simp [hk, neq, sub_ne_zero_of_ne (h₀ (by rw [hi, hl]; exact hk))]
    · have eq : ∑ j, |a k - a j| * x j = |a k - a i| * x i + |a k - a l| * x l + ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a k - a j| * x j := by
          simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, hk, neq.symm]
      have eq2 : |a k - a i| * x i + |a k - a l| * x l = 0 := by simp [hk]
      have eq3 : ∑ j ∈ ({0,1,2,3} \ {i,l}), |a k - a j| * x j = 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_eq_zero; intro j hj
          simp [Finset.mem_erase, Finset.mem_singleton] at hj
          simp [hj.1, hj.2]
      rw [eq, eq2, eq3, h₁] at hk
      simp [hk]
  simp [solution_fun, hx]

⊢ Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑z = 60

proof:
let logw := Real.log w
  have hx : Real.log x = logw / 24 := by field_simp [h0]

  have hxyz : Real.log (x * y * z) = logw / 12 := by field_simp [h2]
  rw [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, hx, hy] at hxyz
  have hz : Real.log z = logw / 60 := by
    rw [add_assoc, ← add_div, ← add_div] at hxyz
    field_simp [hxyz]
    ring
  rw [hz]
  field_simp

proof:
let ρ := rate (ReedSolomon.code domain deg)
  if h : δ ≤ (1 - ρ)/2 then
    let ε := Fintype.card ι / Fintype.card F
    have hε : ε = errorBound δ deg domain := by simp [errorBound, h]
    hε ▸ ReedSolomon.correlatedAgreement_affineLines_uniqueDecoding hδ
  else
    have hδ' : δ ≤ 1 - ρ.sqrt := by
      rw [ReedSolomon.sqrtRate_eq]
      exact hδ
    let m := min (1 - ρ.sqrt - δ) (ρ.sqrt / 20)
    let ε := ⟨(deg ^ 2 : ℝ≥0) / ((2 * m) ^ 7 * (Fintype.card F : ℝ)), by positivity⟩
    have hε : ε = errorBound δ deg domain := by
      simp [errorBound, h, hδ']
      rw [if_neg (not_le_of_gt h)]
    hε ▸ ReedSolomon.correlatedAgreement_affineLines_johnson hδ'
